heroDescription.processed: The Parliament of Aldoria is the supreme legislative body of the nation, responsible for making laws, scrutinizing government, and representing the interests of all Aldorians.
heroDescription.summary: The Parliament of Aldoria is the supreme legislative body of the nation, responsible for making laws, scrutinizing government, and representing the interests of all Aldorians.

ctaDescription.processed: Parliament belongs to the people. Submit petitions, attend public hearings, watch live debates, and contact your representative to make your voice heard.
ctaDescription.summary: Parliament belongs to the people. Submit petitions, attend public hearings, watch live debates, and contact your representative to make your voice heard.
